description.p: QA Scribe helps testers turn exploratory testing sessions, evidence, findings, and notes into structured testware while keeping project data local.

ul.li: Give debug Tauri builds their own app identity and visible dev window title.
Make Rust builds re-embed changed prebuilt frontend assets instead of shipping stale UI files.
Bundle the Inter Variable italic face and tighten closed-stdout streaming regression coverage.
Fix rich editor toolbar buttons so mouse clicks preserve selected text before TipTap formatting commands run.
Keep block-style and link editing controls usable while safely restoring editor selections after native controls receive focus.
Add regression coverage for toolbar focus preservation, link workflows, and stale selection cancellation paths.
Copy notes for Jira with a rich HTML clipboard flavor alongside the plain Markdown fallback.
Replace the custom editor HTML sanitizer core with DOMPurify under the same allowlist and URL policy.
Serialize Jira clipboard Markdown via TipTap's static renderer with pinned, unchanged output.
Add characterization and golden tests for sanitizer and clipboard behavior.
Add Rust dependency auditing to the broad local release gate and release workflow documentation.
Prevent provider-process cleanup hangs and reject oversized clipboard image transforms before allocation.
Enforce Session-managed attachment paths and clarify rich-record body format reset behavior.
Add keyboard focus navigation for note and AI model listboxes.
Preserve dirty Draft and Finding edits and materialize inline images through managed attachments before persistence.
Validate generated managed image references and cap custom Testware instructions before AI prompts and metadata are built.
Tighten release validation, Tauri command permissions, Rust dependency auditing, and Windows provider-process cleanup.
Improve Settings accessibility, CSS token checks, and production frontend bundle splitting.
Preserve pending Note, Draft, and Finding edits across Session switches and window close.
Sanitize generated rich HTML and persist generated outputs with AI Run completion atomically.
Bound concurrent AI jobs and clean up provider probe child process groups.
Strengthen release validation ordering and rich editor accessibility semantics.
Preserve pending Note, Draft, and Finding edits across Session switches and window close.
Sanitize generated rich HTML and persist generated outputs with AI Run completion atomically.
Bound concurrent AI jobs and clean up provider probe child process groups.
Strengthen release validation and rich editor accessibility semantics.
Keep startup bounded by skipping full current-schema foreign-key scans while still validating migrations.
Boot from a bounded recent Session list and minimal active Note state.
Load Draft and Finding bodies lazily when their views or creation flows need them.
Enforce safe attachment relative paths for all core callers.
Keep note title autosave from applying stale saves.
Allow Finding kind and metadata edits after creation.
